items.title: Sudan army denies carrying out hospital attack that killed 64 during Eid
items.dek: The strike killed 64 people, including 13 children, two nurses and a doctor, according to the WHO head.
items.body: The strike killed 64 people, including 13 children, two nurses and a doctor, according to the WHO head.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Independence PD: Barbies sold at Cargo Largo potentially contaminated with fentanyl
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Arozarena apologizes to Raleigh over WBC spat
items.dek: Randy Arozarena says he has apologized to Cal Raleigh for the expletive-laced comments directed at his Mariners teammate earlier this month at the WBC.
items.body: Randy Arozarena says he has apologized to Cal Raleigh for the expletive-laced comments directed at his Mariners teammate earlier this month at the WBC.
items.author: IriLine Desk
